description: A plain candid documentary photograph with no on-image text, graphics, or agency seals. The scene shows an outdoor pipeline construction site in a coniferous forest under a blue, partly cloudy sky. Two workers in high-visibility safety gear (one in a neon-yellow/orange reflective vest and white hard hat, the other in an orange vest and white hard hat) stand among large-diameter black coated steel pipe sections. One worker reaches up to guide a length of pipe being lowered by a sling/crane. Stacked pipe with red-and-green coated ends sits on a flatbed at left. The image is a real photograph, naturalistic lighting and color, not a designed graphic. It accompanies a USDOL tweet promoting the 'American Workers First' mission, used here as illustrative photojournalism of American skilled/energy-sector laborers rather than as a meme or poster.
